actors.text: Drug company tests H0: p=0.10 (side-effect rate) vs Ha: p>0.10. The drug truly is safe (p=0.10) but they reject H0. What error is this?
Type I error (rejected a true H0)
Type II error (failed to reject a false H0)
actors.reflection: Type II is when H0 is FALSE and we fail to reject. Here H0 is TRUE and we rejected -- that's Type I.

actors.text: Correct decision; we rejected so we must be right
actors.reflection: Rejecting H0 when H0 is actually true is the definition of a Type I error -- a false positive, not a correct decision.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
